MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO TAX COSTS FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST TAM, YIN KWAN , AN INDIVIDUAL LEE, YU LING , AN INDIVIDUAL CHU, IRENE , AN INDIVIDUAL LEI, XIANG SI , AN INDIVIDUAL

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 503, PETITIONER'S MOTION TO STRIKE OR TAX COSTS. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONERS' MOTION TO STRIKE OR TAX COSTS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. OF THE $3,682.85 REAL PARTIES SEEK IN COSTS AS STATED IN THEIR AMENDED MEMORANDUM OF COSTS, $1,848 IS TAXED BECAUSE REAL PARTIES HAD NO DUTIES RELATED TO PREPARATION OF THE RECORD AND BECAUSE REAL PARTIES DID NOT SUBMIT EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT ITS COST CLAIM FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS. THE AMOUNT TAXED INCLUDES: $1,750 FOR PREPARATION OF THE RECORD (7 HOURS OF PARALEGAL TIME BILLED AT $250 PER HOUR) AND $98 FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS FEES. THE TOTAL AMOUNT TAXED FROM REAL PARTIES' INCURRED COSTS IS $1,848, LEAVING REAL PARTIES WITH REIMBURSABLE COSTS OF $1,834.85. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Or In The Alternative To Tax Respondent Costs Memo
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Continued To Nov-14-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
No appearance on behalf of petitioners.
Brian F. Crossman, Deputy City Attorney (415-554-6769), appearing for respondent / opposing party City & County of San Francisco

RULING:
PETITIONERS' MOTION TO STRIKE OR TAX RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MEMORANDUM OF COSTS

Respondent's notice to petitioner to appear for argument was sent to a wrong email address. The Court, finding good cause, ordered continued petitioners' motion to strike or tax respondent City and County of San Francisco's memorandum of costs to November 14, 2012 at 10:30 a.m. in Department 503. Respondent to send notice. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
